evidence: "This is probably one of the best foreign films I have ever seen..."
"Two or three different plots are woven together to make a very enjoyable show."
"The writing is original, different from most other series."
"Keeps you on the edge of your seat."
"This series keeps getting better and better."
"The acting is superb, the costumes are lavish, the story, based on history, is rich."
"Band of Brothers will always be my favorite series of all time."
"This series is every bit as good as Band of Brothers."
"The music is wonderful and the acting is very good."
"Beautifully done, Judi Dench and cast are enjoyable to watch."
"I will miss all the characters in this series when I am finished watching."
"This series is raw, with profane language, nudity, sex, and violence."

summary: The user has a strong preference for high-quality dramas, particularly those with complex narratives and fast pacing. They appreciate emotional depth and sensory experiences in their viewing choices, often gravitating towards foreign films and historical content.
